questions: Are there correctness bugs in the CLI library commands?
Does the item resolution utility handle all specified formats correctly?
Is SKILL.md updated with comprehensive agent discoverability documentation?

answers.answer: No bugs found. All 7 new files and 2 modified files compile correctly and follow established CLI patterns (hxFetch, flag parsing, padEnd alignment, .js import extensions).
evidence: npm run build: PASS (tsc exit code 0)

answers.answer: Yes. The resolution utility handles all 3 strategies: (1) exact cuid match, (2) case-insensitive ticket shortId match, (3) case-insensitive title substring match with ambiguity detection. Error messages are descriptive.
evidence: src/lib/resolve-library-item.ts — 3-strategy resolution with extractLibraryItemRef for --item flag or positional arg

answers.answer: Yes. SKILL.md adds 4 library commands to the Available Commands table and includes a comprehensive Library Reports workflow section with 7 example commands covering list, show, comments list (with --section filter), and comments post (with all rating aliases).
evidence: skill-content/SKILL.md — Library Reports section with examples

statement: Code review of helix-cli found no issues. All 7 new files and 2 modified files are correctly implemented following established patterns. SKILL.md documentation is comprehensive. No code fixes needed. Build passes.
